attributes.Sql Query:
SEL WI.*
FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_TSS_FINAL WI
 WHERE WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH IN  (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH 
  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','NET_ADJ_ERP') GROUP BY 1)
AND WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH <> WI.FISCAL_MTH   
AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_UNBILLED_BY_PID  WRDEF
WHERE WRDEF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=WI.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID GROUP BY TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID )

SEL WI.*
FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_TSS_FINAL WI
WHERE WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH IN  (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH 
 WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','NET_ADJ_ERP') GROUP BY 1)
AND WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH = WI.FISCAL_MTH   
AND  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_UNBILLED_BY_PID  WRDEF
WHERE WRDEF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=WI.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID GROUP BY TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID )

SELECT 
 BASE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
 BASE.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 BASE.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 BASE.BE_SPLIT_PCT,
 BASE.PC_SPLIT_PCT,
 ADJ_PID.ITEM_KEY,
 ADJ_PID.BK_PRODUCT_ID
 FROM 
 (SELECT
 BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
 BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 BE_REV/TOTAL_REV AS BE_SPLIT_PCT,
 PC_REV/BE_REV AS PC_SPLIT_PCT
 FROM 
 (SELECT DISTINCT
 BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
 BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT,
 ALLOCATION_PCT,
 SUM(REV) OVER () TOTAL_REV,
 SUM(REV) OVER (PARTITION BY BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD) PC_REV,
 SUM(REV) OVER (PARTITION BY BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR) BE_REV,
 SUM(REV) OVER (PARTITION BY BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID) PF_PC_REV
 FROM
 (SELECT 
 BKGS.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH,
 BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
 BE.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 COALESCE(PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT,
 PC.ALLOCATION_PCT,
 BKGS.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
 SUM(CAST(DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT* BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*PC.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL(26,7))) REV
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_UNBILLED_BY_PID  BKGS
 INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT ITEM_KEY,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC WHERE  BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I' 
 AND FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  IN  
  (SEL  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','NET_ADJ_ERP') GROUP BY 1))
 AND GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' 
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 ) BE 
 ON BE.ITEM_KEY = BKGS.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PC 
 ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT IN 
 (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN  
  (SEL  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','NET_ADJ_ERP') GROUP BY 1))
 AND  PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS' ,'UNKNOWN')  
 WHERE   BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD    IN ( 'ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE')  
 AND BKGS.RECORD_TYPE NOT IN ('GSP_BE_PID','UNASSIGNED','20 RANGE') 
 AND BKGS.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH IN  (SEL  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','NET_ADJ_ERP') GROUP BY 1)
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
 ) A
 )B
 WHERE PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1.00 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ORDER BY PF_PC_REV DESC)=1
 ) BASE
 
 LEFT JOIN
 
 $$STGDB.WI_BE_PF_ADJ_PID_MAP_REV_UNBR ADJ_PID
 ON ADJ_PID.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=BASE.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
 AND ADJ_PID.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=BASE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
 AND ADJ_PID.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD=BASE.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD

SELECT
REV.TRANSACTION_TYPE              ,
REV.RPO_FLG                       ,
CAST((REV.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT*BE_SPLIT_PCT*PC_SPLIT_PCT)AS DECIMAL(26,10))   AS TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,
REV.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH     ,
REV.FISCAL_MTH                    ,
REV.SRC_ENTITY                    ,
REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
REV.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
--REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
REV.WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
REV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
REV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
REV.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
REV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
REV.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
REV.CORP_FLG                      ,
REV.CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
REV.CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
REV.CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
REV.CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
REV.ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
REV.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
REV.FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
REV.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
REV.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
REV.PROCESS_DT                    ,
REV.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
REV.HOLD_FLG                      ,
REV.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
REV.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
REV.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
REV.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
REV.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
REV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
REV.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
REV.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
REV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
CAST((REV.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT*BE_SPLIT_PCT*PC_SPLIT_PCT)AS DECIMAL(26,10))   AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
CAST((REV.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT*BE_SPLIT_PCT*PC_SPLIT_PCT)AS DECIMAL(26,10))   AS TSS_DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
REV.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
REV.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
REV.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
REV.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
REV.DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
REV.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
REV.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
REV.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           ,
REV.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        ,
REV.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
REV.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
REV.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
REV.RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
REV.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
REV.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
REV.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
REV.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
REV.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                ,
REV.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
REV.ATO_NAME                      ,
REV.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
REV.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
REV.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
REV.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
REV.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
REV.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
REV.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
REV.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
REV.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
REV.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
REV.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
CAST((REV.DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT*BE_SPLIT_PCT*PC_SPLIT_PCT)AS DECIMAL(26,10))   AS DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,
REV.DV_ACTIVE_FLG                 ,
REV.DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID           ,
REV.DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT    ,
REV.DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT        ,
REV.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,
REV.DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD     ,
REV.DV_MILESTONE_START_DT         ,
REV.DV_MILESTONE_END_DT           ,
CAST((REV.DV_ORDER_QUANTITY*BE_SPLIT_PCT*PC_SPLIT_PCT)AS DECIMAL(26,10))   AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY,
CAST((REV.DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE_SPLIT_PCT*PC_SPLIT_PCT)AS DECIMAL(26,10))   AS DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT            ,
REV.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT    ,
REV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
REV.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
B.ITEM_KEY AS GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY 
,1  ORDER_ALLOC_PCT
,1 QUOTE_ALLOC_PCT
,1 PP_PID_PCT
,'UNASSIGNED' RECORD_TYPE 
,REV.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG /*ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY23 DEC Release PPMTScope*/
,REV.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT  /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY23 May Release PPMT Scope */
,REV.PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DT /* ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY23 May Release PPMT Scope */
,REV.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_SERVICE_REVENUE_PP  REV
, $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_UA_BE_PRD_ALLOC B

SELECT BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD
,BK_PRODUCT_ID
,ITEM_KEY
FROM
(SELECT BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID,BE.ITEM_KEY,
CASE WHEN BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1 AND BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE '%_ADJ_%' AND PC.ALLOCATION_PCT=1 THEN 1 
   WHEN BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1 AND PC.ALLOCATION_PCT=1 AND BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID NOT LIKE '%_ADJ_%' THEN 2 
   WHEN BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1 AND BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE '%_ADJ_%' AND PC.ALLOCATION_PCT<>1 THEN 3
   WHEN BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1 AND BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID NOT LIKE '%_ADJ_%' AND PC.ALLOCATION_PCT<>1 THEN 4
   WHEN BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT<>1 AND PC.ALLOCATION_PCT<>1 AND BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE '%_ADJ_%' THEN 5
   WHEN BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT<>1 AND BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID NOT LIKE '%_ADJ_%' AND PC.ALLOCATION_PCT<>1 THEN 6
END AS PRIORITY 
 FROM (SELECT BE.ITEM_KEY,BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,SUM(PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT GP ON BE.ITEM_KEY = GP.ITEM_KEY AND GP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'
WHERE BE.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' AND BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I' 
 AND FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT 
 IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN 
 (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','NET_ADJ_ERP') GROUP BY 1))
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) BE
INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN WHERE BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD='Hardware'
AND BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS' ,'UNKNOWN')) PC 
 ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY 
 AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE 
 FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','NET_ADJ_ERP') GROUP BY 1))
WHERE BK_PRODUCT_ID NOT LIKE '%Discontinue%'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ORDER BY PRIORITY,ITEM_KEY DESC)=1

 UNION

 SELECT BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID,BE.ITEM_KEY,
CASE WHEN BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1 AND BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE '%_ADJ_%' AND PC.ALLOCATION_PCT=1 THEN 1
   WHEN BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1 AND PC.ALLOCATION_PCT=1 AND BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID NOT LIKE '%_ADJ_%' THEN 2 
   WHEN BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1 AND BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE '%_ADJ_%' AND PC.ALLOCATION_PCT<>1 THEN 3
   WHEN BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1 AND BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID NOT LIKE '%_ADJ_%' AND PC.ALLOCATION_PCT<>1 THEN 4
   WHEN BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT<>1 AND PC.ALLOCATION_PCT<>1 AND BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE '%_ADJ_%' THEN 5
   WHEN BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT<>1 AND BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID NOT LIKE '%_ADJ_%' AND PC.ALLOCATION_PCT<>1 THEN 6
END AS PRIORITY 
 FROM (SELECT BE.ITEM_KEY,BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,SUM(PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT GP ON BE.ITEM_KEY = GP.ITEM_KEY AND GP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'
WHERE BE.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' AND BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I' 
 AND FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
 WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','NET_ADJ_ERP') GROUP BY 1))
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4) BE
INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN WHERE BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD='Software'
AND BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS' ,'UNKNOWN') ) PC 
 ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY 
 AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','NET_ADJ_ERP') GROUP BY 1))
WHERE BK_PRODUCT_ID NOT LIKE '%Discontinue%'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ORDER BY PRIORITY,ITEM_KEY DESC)=1
) ADJ

SELECT 
 BASE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
 BASE.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 BASE.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 BASE.BE_SPLIT_PCT,
 BASE.PC_SPLIT_PCT,
 ADJ_PID.ITEM_KEY,
 ADJ_PID.BK_PRODUCT_ID
 FROM 
 (SELECT
 BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
 BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 BE_REV/TOTAL_REV AS BE_SPLIT_PCT,
 PC_REV/BE_REV AS PC_SPLIT_PCT
 FROM 
 (SELECT DISTINCT
 BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
 BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT,
 ALLOCATION_PCT,
 SUM(REV) OVER () TOTAL_REV,
 SUM(REV) OVER (PARTITION BY BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD) PC_REV,
 SUM(REV) OVER (PARTITION BY BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR) BE_REV,
 SUM(REV) OVER (PARTITION BY BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID) PF_PC_REV
 FROM
 (SELECT 
 BKGS.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH,
 BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
 BE.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 COALESCE(PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT,
 PC.ALLOCATION_PCT,
 BKGS.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
 SUM(CAST(TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT* BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*PC.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL(26,7))) REV
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_UNBILLED_BY_PID  BKGS
 INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT ITEM_KEY,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC WHERE  BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I' 
 AND FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  IN  
 (SEL  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','NET_ADJ_ERP') GROUP BY 1))
 AND GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' 
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 ) BE 
 ON BE.ITEM_KEY = BKGS.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PC 
 ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT IN 
 (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN  
 (SEL  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','NET_ADJ_ERP') GROUP BY 1))
 AND  PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS' ,'UNKNOWN')  
 WHERE   BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD    IN ( 'ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE')  
 AND BKGS.RECORD_TYPE NOT IN ('GSP_BE_PID','UNASSIGNED','20 RANGE') 
 AND BKGS.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH IN  (SEL  FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_UNBILL_CTRL_MTH  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','NET_ADJ_ERP') GROUP BY 1)
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
 ) A
 )B
 WHERE PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1.00 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ORDER BY PF_PC_REV DESC)=1
 ) BASE
 
 LEFT JOIN
 
 $$STGDB.WI_BE_PF_ADJ_PID_MAP_REV_UNBR ADJ_PID
 ON ADJ_PID.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=BASE.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
 AND ADJ_PID.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=BASE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
 AND ADJ_PID.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD=BASE.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD

SELECT
REV.TRANSACTION_TYPE              ,
REV.RPO_FLG                       ,
CAST((REV.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT*BE_SPLIT_PCT*PC_SPLIT_PCT)AS DECIMAL(26,10))   AS TSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,
REV.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH     ,
REV.FISCAL_MTH                    ,
REV.SRC_ENTITY                    ,
REV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
REV.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
REV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
--REV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
REV.WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
REV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
REV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
REV.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
REV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
REV.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
REV.CORP_FLG                      ,
REV.CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
REV.CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
REV.CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
REV.CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
REV.ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
REV.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
REV.FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
REV.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
REV.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
REV.PROCESS_DT                    ,
REV.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
REV.HOLD_FLG                      ,
REV.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
REV.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
REV.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
REV.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
REV.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
REV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
REV.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
REV.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
REV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
REV.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
CAST((REV.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT*BE_SPLIT_PCT*PC_SPLIT_PCT)AS DECIMAL(26,10))   AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
